title.en: He didn't resist, and was directly killed by th...

content.en:
Really.

Ye Tian's guess was very correct, a mere superdimensional creature at the peak realm god level was too weak for the superdimensional realm Sky Survey Realm snake, and he didn't bother to do it, so it was almost the same as letting the half-step Sky Survey Realm snake of the transcendent realm practice with his hands.

Therefore, Ye Tian ushered in the half-step Heaven Survey Realm Snake of the Transcendent Realm.

Ye Tian sensed this half-step Heaven Survey Realm Snake in the Transcendent Realm, and he could copy the body of this Heaven Survey Realm Snake later.

Rumble!!!!!

He didn't resist, and was directly killed by this Sky Survey Realm snake.

......

"That's it, let's copy a half-step Sky Survey Boundary Snake in the Extradimensional Realm, and then use the Sky Survey Realm Snake's super perception of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone Fragment to find the Extradimensional Boundary Stone Fragment!"

Ye Tian's copy body in the Seven Thousand and One Territory immediately began to copy the Heaven Survey Realm Snake. "Nine-Sixty-Three"

Soon.

A half-step Heaven Survey Realm Snake cultivated in the Transcendent Dimensional Realm was copied by Ye Tian.

However, if such a Sky Survey Realm Snake were to look for the fragments of the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone here, it would be too conspicuous.

So, he had to cover it up.

I saw that Ye Tian's true body copy body immediately swallowed the Heaven Survey Realm Snake into the void in his body, so that with the cover of his true body copy body, it was not easy to be discovered.

"Next, let the Sky Survey Realm Snake copy its body to find the fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone!"

According to the information of the Sky Seeping Pavilion, the Sky Survey Realm Snake is also extremely eager for the Transcendental Boundary Stone Fragments, and can complete the bloodline transformation with the help of the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone Fragments, and if there are enough Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stones, it can even directly step into the third realm.

Of course, the Sky Survey Realm Snake can't easily find the Extradimensional Boundary Stone, and it must be close to a certain range before it can sense it.

Wow!

Ye Tian cautiously moved forward, using the Sky Survey Realm Snake's induction of the Extra-Dimensional Boundary Stone to find the fragments of the Extra-Dimensional Boundary Stone.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian searched for one annihilation area after another, but he didn't find the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone.

Naturally, he was not in a hurry, after all, as long as he continued to look for it slowly, the fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone had not been found, and he would definitely be able to find them.

Before you know it, a tenth of an extradimensional epoch has passed.

this day.

"Attraction!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

His Heaven Survey Realm Serpent's replica body sensed the attraction of an item to itself, which must have been a fragment of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone.

Wow!

Ye Tian followed the induction and shuttled through, and he was also careful during the period to prevent danger.

Fortunately, everything went well and he did not encounter any danger.

Soon, he saw a land of fragments, where there were countless fragments, many of which were various metal fragments and weapon fragments, and this kind of thing, which was everywhere in this land of annihilation, also had a certain value.

However, many half-step extradimensional realms still don't look down on these metal and weapon fragments.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian came to one of the stones, stretched out his hand and gently pinched it, and the stone shattered, revealing the fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone inside.

The fragment is small, the size of a thumb cap, but its value is unimaginable.

"Finally found a fragment of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone!"

Ye Tian didn't stay here, but immediately let a replica body take it out of the place of annihilation in the Seven Thousand and One Territory.

If this piece of debris is found, he will not be able to save it.

So, it's safest to get out of here.

After a period of time, Ye Tian left the 7001 Territory Annihilation Land, and then returned to the Ice Ghost Organization Headquarters through the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array, and then returned to the 7362 Territory.

In this way, he breathed a sigh of relief.

Ye Tian continued to search for the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone Fragment, and his luck was not bad, only one percent of the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone years later, he found another Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone Fragment, and this fragment was even smaller, only about one-third the size of a thumb cover.

Just as Ye Tian continued to search for the fragments of the Extradimensional Domain Boundary Stone, a voice spread throughout the entire Seven Thousand and One Territory Annihilation Land.

"This land of annihilation has been occupied by our Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce, all living beings have left here, otherwise there will be no forgiveness for killing!!!"

Hearing this voice, all the half-step extradimensional realms and extradimensional realms ran away, and even the superdimensional realms of the great forces such as the Garan Chamber of Commerce were evacuated as soon as possible, and they did not dare to stay here.

"Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce?What kind of force is this?"[]

Ye Tian was puzzled.

However, he knew the origin of this force after a little inquiry... 0

The Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce comes from the Five Thousand Territory, and has several Extradimensional Realm powerhouses in the Third Realm, and there are many Extradimensional Realm powerhouses in the Second Realm, and its strength is enough to sweep all the forces in the Six Thousand Territory.

The reason why the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce will still give face and let the half-step extra-dimensional realm and extra-dimensional realm here evacuate is mainly because some forces in the 6000 territory also have backers behind them, and it is not appropriate to offend, so let these half-step extra-dimensional realms and extradimensional realms evacuate.

After that, they will occupy this place, where they will search for fragments of the Boundary Stone of the Extradimensional Realm.

After understanding the strength of the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce, Ye Tian did not plan to continue to search for the fragments of the Transcendent Domain Boundary Stone, even if there was a copy of the body of the Heaven Survey Realm Snake, he did not dare to continue to search, otherwise he would inevitably be discovered by the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce.

The first time.

He annihilated his Heaven Survey Realm Serpent's replica body, and then left here.

......

Polar Yang Realm.

At this moment, many half-step extradimensional realms here were discussing the matter of the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce.

Ye Tian chatted and communicated with some half-step extradimensional realms, and also learned about the information of the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce.

This time, the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce got a fragment of the Sky Survey Disk, and the real Sky Survey Disk was urged by the powerhouse of the Third Realm Extradimensional Realm, which could cover a Transcendent Territory, and would soon be able to lock all the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone fragments.

With only 3.1 pieces of a Sky Survey Disk shattered, it naturally couldn't cover too many areas, but it could be triggered by a Second Realm Extradimensional Realm powerhouse.

A second-realm extradimensional realm powerhouse of the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce urged this Heaven Survey Disk fragment to search for the superdimensional realm boundary stone fragment all the time, and the other forces did not know how many superdimensional realm stone fragments they could find.

However, the remaining fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone will inevitably fall into the hands of the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce.

"Fortunately, I used the Heaven Survey Realm Snake to copy the body earlier and found two small fragments of the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone, if it was a little later, then it would really be impossible to catch it at all!" Ye Tian secretly sighed.

Since the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce occupied the territory of Seven Thousand and One, other forces did not dare to intervene, and there was no news to pass on.

Ye Tian didn't care about the matter of the Seven Thousand and One Territory, but was ready to use the fragments of the Extradimensional Domain Boundary Stone to refine his extradimensional body.
